_comment: Run 2 v4 (HF native + resume). vLLM path abandoned: vllm 0.6 doesn't support Qwen3, vllm 0.7+ needs torch 2.6, vllm 0.8 has cascading optional-dep import failures. Using HF model.generate (slow but bulletproof) + split-container resume: container 1 runs ~12h (1 epoch), container 2 next morning resumes from latest HF checkpoint (epoch 2). See notes.md.

reward._note: Format reward max = 0.225. Granular scoring ensures variance even when correctness is uniform across the 4 stochastic rollouts.
